title: BLM Enhances Protections for 13 Million Acres in Central Alaska
summary: Amidst a period of transition and uncertainty about the future, we have found moments of peace in recent news regarding our Alaskan lands. After nearly a decade of research, public outreach, and negotiations, the U.S. Bureau of Land Management (BLM) has finalized a revised resource management plan (RMP) that strengthens protections for more than 13 million acres in central Alaska. Announced on November 12, 2024, this new plan is a significant milestone in balancing conservation eff...

title: Mat-Su Title Agency Merger with Fidelity Title Agency of Alaska, LLC
summary: PRESS RELEASE Sitnasuak Native Corporation announces an official merger of Mat-Su Title Agency under Fidelity Title Agency of Alaska LLC. This merger combines the strengths and expertise of two leading title agencies providing enhanced services and expanded resources to clients throughout Alaska. Th...
